question:
Will Damac Saudi Club win on 2025-11-06?

Description: In the upcoming game, scheduled for November 6, 2025
If Damac Saudi Club wins, this market will resolve to "Yes".
Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve "No".
This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

Resolution source: https://www.slstat.com/

evidences.title: What Happens If Al Nassr Win, Lose or Draw vs. Damac? Saudi Pro League Title Scenario Explained - Yahoo Sports
evidences.content: Al Nassr will be playing at home against 15th-place Damac, who is fighting to avoid relegation; Damac is only two points above the relegation zone. Al Hilal will be playing away from home against Al Fayha, who are 10th in the league table. ## Key Results That Crown The New Saudi Pro League Champions Al Nassr cannot drop points against Damac as they have a two-point advantage over Al Hilal. A win over Damac guarantees them the Saudi Pro League title, without needing to worry about Al Hilal's match against Al Fayha. If Al Nassr loses to Damac, Al Nassr would stay on 83 points and would need Al Hilal to lose or draw with Al Fayha to be crowned champions. If Al Nassr loses and Al Hilal beats Al Fayha, Al Hilal jumps to 84 points and wins the league title. [...] Soccer image Soccer image ... Fantasy image Fantasy image Watch image Watch image Network image Network image Athlon Sports Athlon Sports # What Happens If Al Nassr Win, Lose or Draw vs. Damac? Saudi Pro League Title Scenario Explained Today is the last matchday of the 2025/2026 Saudi Pro League, with seven games being played at the same time. The title race will end today, with Al Nassr and Al Hilal in contention to win the...

evidences.title: The NT's Assistant Coaching Staff Continues Field Visits to Clubs - Saudi Arabian Football Federation
evidences.content: The Saudi national team's assistant coaching staff continued its field visits to clubs, visiting Damac and Abha clubs as part of the early preparation program for the Green Falcons' participation in the 2026 World Cup. During the visit to Damac Club, the coaching staff reviewed the status of players nominated to join the national team, as direct meetings were held with the players, emphasizing the importance of the current phase, adherence to technical and physical instructions, compliance with approved health and nutrition programs, and a review of each player's physical indicators and statistics to enhance their readiness. evidences.title: Colts Training Camp Inclement Weather Fan Safety Plan
evidences.content: Severe Weather Notice: If lightning is within ten (10) miles of the practice field, the team and staff will shelter in place. Fans will be advised to return to their vehicles and seek cover until an all-clear is given. Parking: In the event of inclement weather prior to practice starting, all fans will be directed to park in Lot C. The first 750 fans in line with a wristband will be prioritized with access to watch the indoor practice. All pre-purchased parking will be refunded to the initial payment method within 3-5 business days. Indoor Autograph Policy: Unfortunately, due to space constraints, the team is not able to facilitate autographs before or after practice.
